nodes.name: HTTP Request | Forex Factory Calendar Today

conditions.keyValue: ={{$items("Code | Normalise Forex Factory Events", 0, 0).length ? $items("Code | Normalise Forex Factory Events", 0, 0).first().json.event_date : new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}}

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map(item => item.json).filter(row => row._action === 'create' && row.currency && row.event_name).map(row => ({ json: row }));
return $input.all().map(item => item.json).filter(row => row._action === 'update' && row.currency && row.event_name).map(row => ({ json: row }));
